name: Home Assistant
description: WebSocket bridge from OpenClaw to Home Assistant. Powers the kiosk dashboard view; auth, allow-list, and deny-list policy live in this plugin.

homeAssistantUrl.label: Home Assistant URL
homeAssistantUrl.help: WebSocket URL for the Home Assistant API. Must start with ws:// or wss://.

tokenRef.label: HA token credential reference
tokenRef.help: Credential reference for the dedicated non-admin HA user (jarvis_kiosk). The literal long-lived token lives under ~/.openclaw/credentials/, never in this config.

allowList.label: Allow-listed entities
allowList.help: Home Assistant entity IDs the kiosk is permitted to read. Every slot target must reference an entity in this list.

denyServiceList.label: Service deny-list
denyServiceList.help: Services the kiosk must never call (for example lock.unlock). Belt-and-braces with the HA-user-side deny-list from the Jarvis Butler plan.

slots.label: Slot to entity map
slots.help: Maps kiosk slot names (gauge.battery_soc, tile.gate_main, ...) to allow-listed HA entity IDs.
